remarks: Stylish2 bedroom 2 full bath residence is totally renovated, with an open floor plan. This is a hidden gem nestled in the charming enclave of Westport village. Beautiful, updated kitchen with marble countertops, open concept living area enhanced with vaulted ceilings, and a gas fireplace creating an inviting atmosphere for relaxing and entertaining. Convenient location to all Westport amenities.
